description: Detects weak cryptography in C#: MD5.Create(), SHA1.Create(), DES.Create(), ECB cipher mode, insecure Random. JSON version matches all invocation expressions (cannot filter by method name without #match? predicate support). Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: Method invocation detected -- verify this is not MD5.Create(), SHA1.Create(), DES.Create(), or insecure Random usage; use SHA256/AES/RandomNumberGenerator instead
